zh.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: 英國史洛普爾斯坦頓 武朋 海因 希斯
zh.Tetbury, Cotswold, Gloucestershire, Engl: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾特波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Abigail Stanton於大約1263年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾時，她的父親Stephen de Stanton34歲，母親Katherine Strange28歲。她與John Savage結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1320年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾特波利享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Abigail Stanton于大约1263年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾时，她的父亲Stephen de Stanton34岁，母亲Katherine Strange28岁。她与John Savage结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1320年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾特波利享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stanton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England called Stanton or Staunton, especially Stanton in Staffordshire and Staunton in Worcestershire, all named with Old English stān ‘stone’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Most of the placenames come from their situation on stony ground, but in the case of Stanton Harcourt in Oxfordshire and Stanton Drew in Avon the reference is to the proximity of prehistoric stone monuments. The name has also sometimes been chosen by Ashkenazic Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames. This surname has also long been established in Ireland (especially Mayo).

variants.name: Staunton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Ciaran, Cormac.

English and Irish: variant of Stanton . This English name has been established (in this spelling) since medieval times in Ireland (Mayo, Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as de Stonndún. Compare McEvilly .

variants.name: Stainton
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and northern England): habitational name from any of various places called Stainton, including Stainton by Langworth, Market Stainton, and Stainton le Vale (all Lincolnshire), Stainton Dale (North Yorkshire), and Stainton (Cumberland, Durham, Lincolnshire, Lancashire, Westmorland, Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire). The placenames derive either from Old Norse steinn ‘stone, rock’ or from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’, later replaced by Old Norse steinn, + Old English tūn. The name was probably sometimes confused with or absorbed by Stanton .

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Abigail Stanton was born about 1263, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Stephen de Stanton, was 34 and her mother, Katherine Strange, was 28. She married John Savage. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1320, in Tetbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

ko.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: 영국 슈럽실르 스탠턴 업 이인 히스
ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Stanton(이)가 대략 1263년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stephen de Stanton(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Strange(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 John Savage(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 테트버이에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: стантон упон хаин хит, шропшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abigail Stanton родилась около 1263 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Stephen de Stanton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Strange, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Savage. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1320 г. в местности тетбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.
